examples: In 1912, the Titanic sank on her maiden voyage.
The Olympic class included the Olympic, the Britannic and the Titanic.
What you may not know is that the Titanic wasn't even the flagship of this class.
When the Titanic was sinking in 1912, its operator first sent out CQD and then SOS, alternating.
The dock is currently maintained by the Northern Ireland Science Park in Belfast's Titanic Quarter.
